steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: ”Only recently” signals that genetic research made a new discovery. The blank verb must express discovering or revealing the identity of the wild ancestor.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Revealed” conveys exactly this—research discovered and made known that the ancestor is the wild johnny gourd. The other three (expanded, encouraged, petitioned) don't describe the action of discovering an ancestor. That matches choice A — A is correct.
